fresh_facts.claim: A third US aircraft carrier is en route to the region near the Strait of Hormuz alongside logistical reinforcements and military drills.
Pentagon confirmed 415 US service members wounded in Operation Epic Fury from Iranian drone and missile strikes on bases in Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, UAE, and Bahrain.
Six US service members were killed at Port of Shuaiba in Kuwait and six more in a KC-135 crash in Iraq from Iranian attacks.
The US seized an Iranian cargo vessel, escalating maritime tensions.
President Trump threatened 'problems like never before' if Iran stalls negotiations.
A US delegation headed to Pakistan led by VP Vance for mediation talks with Iran.
Iran refused to attend US-Iran talks scheduled for Wednesday, April 22, 2026, in Islamabad, citing unmet conditions including the US ending its blockade.
IRGC Aerospace Force Commander S. Majid Mousavi stated that weapons replenishment was accelerated during the ceasefire.
An IRGC video from April 19 showed active underground missile and drone launchers and repairs.
Iran is coordinating with Iraq militias for potential joint attacks if war resumes.
Iran issued threats of 'battlefield surprises' targeting the Strait of Hormuz and Bab el-Mandeb routes.
IRGC Commander Ahmed Vahidi advocates a firm negotiation stance on proxies and ballistic missiles.
Internal 'violent struggle' at IRGC leadership reportedly risks regime stability.
Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei appointed Major General Amir Hatami as overall Artesh commander, replacing Abdol Rahim Mousavi.
Israel is on peak alert for ceasefire expiration with Iran and is deepening its hold on southern Lebanon's security zone.
An Iranian Revolutionary Guard fired on a tanker in the Strait of Hormuz on April 18, reimposing a blockade one day after pledging to reopen it.
Iran explicitly rejects a second round of talks in Islamabad, though Pakistan remains confident in facilitating before the deadline.
US port blockades persist against Iran until an agreement is reached.
Domestic US anti-war protests detained over 60 veterans amid war fatigue.
Iran's UN ambassador tied Islamabad talks to the US blockade ending.
Iranian officials state that Pakistan's US mediation efforts have yielded no results.

regime_fall.current_status: Military escalation has intensified dramatically with a third US carrier en route, confirmed Iranian coordination with Iraqi militias, threats to critical maritime chokepoints, and explicit Iranian rejection of scheduled diplomatic talks in Islamabad, while internal IRGC leadership restructuring and hardliner consolidation continue amid persistent economic blockade and growing US domestic war fatigue.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Supreme Leader Khamenei appointed Major General Amir Hatami as overall Artesh commander, signaling significant military leadership restructuring amid ongoing escalation and internal power dynamics.
